title: Amsterdam entrepreneurs hire private guards to fight drug-related thefts, nuisance
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹企业家雇佣私人保安打击与毒品相关的盗窃和滋扰行为
description: Entrepreneurs around Oosterpark in Amsterdam have hired private security guards starting in May to tackle growing disturbances from homeless drug users, including thefts, drug dealing, and open use
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹奥斯特公园附近的商家从五月份开始雇佣私人保安，以应对无家可归的吸毒者日益增多的扰乱治安行为，包括盗窃、毒品交易和公开吸毒。

title: More Dutch workers get paid time off on Liberation Day
title_zh: 更多荷兰工人解放日获得带薪休假
description: The number of collective labor agreements in the Netherlands granting workers a paid day off on Liberation Day every year has grown to 13 percent in 2025 from 8 percent in 2022, according to the em
description_zh: 据荷兰劳动关系委员会（EM）的数据显示，荷兰集体劳动协议中规定工人每年解放日带薪休假的比例，已从2022年的8%增长到2025年的13%。

title: Rare white-beaked dolphin found alive on Egmond beach
title_zh: 在埃格蒙德海滩发现一头罕见的白喙海豚，它还活着
description: A live white-beaked dolphin, a species that rarely strands in Dutch waters, has been found on the beach at Egmond...
description_zh: 一只活着的白喙海豚在埃格蒙德海滩被发现，这种海豚很少在荷兰水域搁浅……

title: WHO: Now 7 hantavirus infections on Dutch cruise ship, incl. 3 dead
title_zh: 世界卫生组织：荷兰邮轮上现已确诊7例汉坦病毒感染病例，其中3例死亡
description: The World Health Organizationsaidthere are now seven cases linked to the cruise ship MV Hondius, including two
description_zh: 世界卫生组织表示，目前已有7例病例与“洪都拉斯”号邮轮有关，其中包括2例新冠肺炎病例。

title: Survey: Only 43% of Dutch plan to celebrate Liberation Day amid polarization fears
title_zh: 调查显示：在对社会两极分化的担忧下，仅有43%的荷兰人计划庆祝解放日。
description: More than half of Dutch people will not celebrate Liberation Day this year, with polarization the top threat to their sense of freedom, according to a new poll.
description_zh: 一项新的民意调查显示，超过半数的荷兰人今年将不会庆祝解放日，两极分化是他们自由感的最大威胁。

title: Albert Heijn guards to wear body cameras amid surge in violence against employees
title_zh: 为应对员工暴力事件激增，Albert Heijn超市保安将佩戴执法记录仪。
description: Supermarket chain Albert Heijn is launching a pilot program using body cameras on security guards in response to thousands of annual reports of aggression and violence against its employees, Het Pa
description_zh: 据Het Pa报道，为应对每年数千起员工遭受攻击和暴力事件的报告，连锁超市Albert Heijn启动了一项试点项目，在保安人员身上佩戴执法记录仪。

title: Dutch arrested in Spain’s record 35,000-kg cocaine bust off Western Sahara
title_zh: 一名荷兰人在西班牙于西撒哈拉附近海域查获的创纪录的35000公斤可卡因案中被捕
description: Spanish Guardia Civil officers seized a record 35,000 to 40,000 kilograms of cocaine from the cargo ship Arconian off the coast of Western Sahara and arrested 23 people, most of them Dutch, Filipin
description_zh: 西班牙国民警卫队在西撒哈拉海岸附近从货船“阿科尼亚”号上缴获了创纪录的35000至40000公斤可卡因，并逮捕了23人，其中大部分是荷兰人和菲律宾人。

title: Albert Heijn to trial body cameras for security guards
title_zh: Albert Heijn超市将试用保安人员佩戴的执法记录仪
description: Supermarket chain Albert Heijn is to equip security guards in Amsterdam and Rotterdam with body cameras to see if it...
description_zh: 连锁超市 Albert Heijn 将在阿姆斯特丹和鹿特丹为保安人员配备执法记录仪，以观察……

title: Police make 13 arrests at Remembrance Day ceremony in Amsterdam
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹阵亡将士纪念日仪式上，警方逮捕了13人。
description: Police arrested 13 people during Monday’s Remembrance Day ceremonies in Amsterdam, including one person who shouted out during the two...
description_zh: 周一在阿姆斯特丹举行的阵亡将士纪念日仪式上，警方逮捕了13人，其中包括一名在两次仪式中大声喧哗的人……

title: No Dutch lawyer will defend Taghi, appeal at standstill
title_zh: 没有荷兰律师愿意为塔吉辩护，上诉程序陷入僵局。
description: A new attempt to find lawyers willing to represent Ridouan Taghi has failed, leaving the convicted gangland boss without counsel...
description_zh: 寻找愿意为里杜安·塔吉提供辩护的律师的新尝试失败了，这位被定罪的黑帮老大因此失去了律师……

title: Hantavirus confirmed in woman who died after leaving cruise ship
title_zh: 一名女子离开游轮后死亡，经证实感染了汉坦病毒。
description: A second case of hantavirus has been confirmed among the passengers on board a cruise ship where three people have...
description_zh: 一艘邮轮上已确诊第二例汉坦病毒感染病例，此前该邮轮上已有三人感染……

title: “On WWII burial certificates: code 2 denoted a Black soldier”
title_zh: “二战士兵葬礼证明上：代码 2 表示黑人士兵”
description: The liberation of northern Limburg in early March 1945 was largely down to one of three African-American battalions in the...
description_zh: 1945年3月初，北林堡的解放主要归功于驻扎在该地区三个非裔美国人营中的一个……

title: Liberation Day fire lit as national celebrations begin
title_zh: 解放日篝火点燃，全国庆祝活动拉开帷幕
description: Two veterans of World War II helped light the liberation fire in Wageningen at  midnight to mark 81 years since...
description_zh: 两名二战老兵在午夜时分帮助点燃了瓦赫宁根的解放之火，以纪念解放81周年……

title: Police shoot man after reported firearm threat in Rotterdam
title_zh: 鹿特丹警方接到枪支威胁报告后开枪击中一名男子
description: Police in Rotterdam shot and wounded a man Monday evening after responding to a report of a firearm threat in the Hoogvliet district, while national investigators opened a separate inquiry into whe
description_zh: 周一晚间，鹿特丹警方在接到霍格弗利特区发生持枪威胁的报警后，开枪击伤了一名男子。与此同时，国家调查人员已就此事展开独立调查。

title: Netherlands celebrates Liberation Day on Tuesday, but rain could dampen some parties
title_zh: 荷兰将于周二庆祝解放日，但降雨可能会影响一些庆祝活动。
description: People around the Netherlands will have the chance to celebrate the anniversary of the country’s liberation from Nazi occupation during World War II.
description_zh: 荷兰各地的人们将有机会庆祝该国在二战期间摆脱纳粹占领的周年纪念日。

title: 13 arrested at the Dam in Amsterdam during National Remembrance ceremony
title_zh: 在阿姆斯特丹水坝举行的国家纪念仪式上，13人被捕。
description: Thirteen people were arrested Monday evening at the National Remembrance ceremony on the Dam in Amsterdam, where roughly 15,000 people gathered for two minutes of silence honoring victims of World
description_zh: 周一晚间，在阿姆斯特丹水坝举行的国家纪念仪式上，13人被捕。当时约有15000人聚集在此，默哀两分钟，悼念世界大战的遇难者。

title: Dutch keep betting on current events despite ban on leading crypto betting platform
title_zh: 尽管领先的加密货币博彩平台遭到禁止，荷兰人仍然继续对时事进行投注。
description: Dutch residents continue to bet on current events through cryptocurrency prediction markets even after the Dutch Gambling Authority
description_zh: 即使荷兰博彩管理局已经采取行动，荷兰居民仍然继续通过加密货币预测市场对时事进行投注。

title: Liberation flame kicks off celebrations in Netherlands; King and Queen lay wreath on Dam
title_zh: 解放之火在荷兰点燃，庆祝活动拉开帷幕；国王和王后在水坝敬献花圈。
description: King Willem-Alexander and Queen Máxima laid a wreath at the National Monument on Dam Square in Amsterdam on Monday evening during the two-minute silence for National Remembrance Day.
description_zh: 周一晚间，在阿姆斯特丹水坝广场的国家纪念碑前，威廉-亚历山大国王和马克西玛王后敬献了花圈，当时正值国家纪念日两分钟默哀仪式。

title: Higher rates drove down Dutch mortgage applications in April
title_zh: 4月份，利率上升导致荷兰抵押贷款申请量下降。
description: Higher mortgage rates caused Dutch homebuyers and homeowners seeking financing for renovations to apply for fewer mortgages in April, according to figures released by the Hypotheken Data Netwerk, o
description_zh: 根据荷兰抵押贷款数据网络（Hypotheken Data Netwerk）发布的数据，较高的抵押贷款利率导致荷兰购房者和寻求房屋翻新融资的房主在4月份申请抵押贷款的数量减少。

title: Dutch meat processor executives arrested in unsafe meat probe; Firm files for bankruptcy
title_zh: 荷兰肉类加工企业高管因涉嫌肉类安全问题被捕；公司申请破产
description: Esro Vlees, a meat processing company in Nuenen, has filed for bankruptcy after the Dutch Food and Consumer Product Safety Authority (NVWA) revoked its operating license due to suspicions that the
description_zh: 位于纽嫩的肉类加工企业Esro Vlees在荷兰食品和消费品安全管理局（NVWA）因怀疑其存在不法行为而吊销其营业执照后，已申请破产。

title: Dutch energy groups blast regulator’s plan to charge power producers for grid costs
title_zh: 荷兰能源团体猛烈抨击监管机构向电力生产商收取电网成本的计划。
description: Energy companies are “seriously concerned” about plans by the Netherlands Authority for Consumers and Markets (ACM) to introduce a so-called feed-in tariff that would require large electricity prod
description_zh: 能源公司对荷兰消费者和市场管理局（ACM）计划推出的所谓上网电价补贴政策表示“严重关切”，该政策将要求大幅提高电力产量。

title: Customs: Surge in Chinese packages tied to shipping shifts, not consumer stockpiling
title_zh: 海关：中国包裹激增与运输路线调整有关，而非消费者囤货
description: Dutch customs officials say a recent surge in low-cost parcels arriving in the Netherlands from outside the European Union appears to be linked to shifting shipping routes rather than a rush by con
description_zh: 荷兰海关官员表示，近期从欧盟以外地区涌入荷兰的低价包裹数量激增，似乎与运输路线的改变有关，而非走私者蜂拥而至。

title: The Netherlands remembers its war dead with two minutes silence
title_zh: 荷兰以两分钟默哀悼战争死难者。
description: The Netherlands remembered its war dead with two minutes’ silence at 8pm on Monday evening. Thousands of people packed into...
description_zh: 周一晚8点，荷兰举国默哀两分钟，悼念战争死难者。数千人聚集在……

title: Community pays to replace Urk family's memorial stone at extermination camp Sobibor
title_zh: 社区出资更换了乌尔克一家在索比堡灭绝营的纪念碑。
description: Thanks to a fundraising campaign by history teacher Maarten Post, quickly funded by the Urk business community, Israel, Hendrika, and Lea Kropveld from Urk again have a memorial stone at
description_zh: 感谢历史老师马尔滕·波斯特发起的筹款活动，以及乌尔克商业社区的迅速资助，来自乌尔克的以色列、亨德里卡和莉亚·克罗普维尔德再次拥有了一块纪念碑。

title: Video: Part of Gilze-Rijen air base evacuated after social media video shows an intruder
title_zh: 视频：社交媒体视频显示入侵者后，吉尔泽-里詹空军基地的部分区域被疏散
description: A portion of Gilze-Rijen air base was evacuated, and nearly all the hundreds of employees were sent home Monday afternoon after a video circulating on social media appeared to show a man walking ac
description_zh: 周一下午，吉尔泽-里延空军基地部分区域被疏散，数百名员工几乎全部被遣散回家。此前，一段在社交媒体上流传的视频显示，一名男子步行穿过……

title: Over 100 Dutch municipalities investigating large-scale WWII Jewish property seizures
title_zh: 超过100个荷兰市政当局正在调查二战期间大规模没收犹太人财产的事件
description: All 103 Dutch municipalities where Jewish-owned real estate was seized on a large scale during World War II are now investigating those actions, according to research by
description_zh: 据一项研究显示，二战期间大规模没收犹太人拥有的房产的103个荷兰市镇目前正在调查这些行为。

title: More than one-third of Dutch club athletes faced verbal or physical abuse last season
title_zh: 上赛季，超过三分之一的荷兰俱乐部运动员遭受过言语或肢体虐待。
description: More than one-third of athletes who compete in organized club sports in the Netherlands experienced some form of boundary-crossing behavior during the 2024-2025 sports season, ranging from verbal e
description_zh: 在2024-2025赛季，超过三分之一的荷兰参加俱乐部体育运动的运动员经历过某种形式的越界行为，包括言语和肢体冲突。

title: NL considering medical evac. from hantavirus cruise ship; Deceased couple from Friesland
title_zh: 荷兰正在考虑从感染汉坦病毒的游轮上撤离病人；一对来自弗里斯兰的夫妇不幸去世。
description: The Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs is examining the possibilities of a medical evacuation of a “few individuals” from the cruise ship MV Hondius, a spokesperson said to ANP.
description_zh: 荷兰外交部发言人告诉荷兰通讯社（ANP），荷兰外交部正在研究从“洪迪乌斯”号游轮上撤离“少数几人”进行医疗救援的可能性。

title: Three Dutch people killed in traffic accident in France
title_zh: 三名荷兰人在法国发生的交通事故中丧生
description: Three Dutch nationals were killed, and two others were injured when two vehicles collided in northern France, the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs confirmed. The crash happened around 12:30 p.m.
description_zh: 荷兰外交部证实，两辆汽车在法国北部相撞，造成三名荷兰公民死亡，另有两人受伤。事故发生在下午12点30分左右。

title: Dutch tech group Techleap splits into public-private entities to boost deeptech and AI
title_zh: 荷兰科技集团Techleap分拆为公私合营实体，以推动深度科技和人工智能的发展。
description: Techleap, the organization that accelerates the growth of Dutch tech founders and companies, restructured itself on May 1 into a public-private organization consisting of two independent entities,
description_zh: 致力于加速荷兰科技创始人及公司发展的机构 Techleap 于 5 月 1 日重组为一家由两个独立实体组成的公私合营机构。

title: Cruise operators still investigating suspected hantavirus cases
title_zh: 邮轮运营商仍在调查疑似汉坦病毒病例
description: The operator of a cruise on which three people died during a suspected outbreak of hantavirus has said the cause...
description_zh: 一艘游轮的运营方表示，船上三人疑似感染汉坦病毒死亡的原因是……

title: Finding a job in the Netherlands: what you need to know
title_zh: 在荷兰找工作：你需要知道什么
description: Looking for a job in the Netherlands or thinking about making a career change? Here’s an update of things to...
description_zh: 想在荷兰找工作，或者考虑换工作？这里有一些最新信息……

title: Man in court charged with planning to kill Dutch princesses
title_zh: 男子因涉嫌策划谋杀荷兰公主被起诉
description: A 33-year-old man has appeared in court in The Hague charged with threatening the lives of two of the three...
description_zh: 一名33岁男子在海牙出庭受审，他被控威胁三人中两人的生命……

title: Court rejects NAC Breda bid to replay match over player’s work permit breach
title_zh: 法院驳回了NAC布雷达因球员违反工作许可规定而提出的重赛请求。
description: A Dutch court has ruled that NAC Breda’s request to have its Eredivisie match against Go Ahead Eagles replayed will not be granted after rejecting the club’s claim over the participation of ineligi
description_zh: 荷兰一家法院裁定，NAC布雷达俱乐部要求重赛与前进之鹰队的荷甲联赛的请求不予批准，此前该俱乐部提出的关于非参赛球员参赛资格的主张被驳回。

title: Man, 33, remains in custody over suspected plot against Princesses Amalia and Alexia
title_zh: 一名33岁男子因涉嫌密谋陷害阿玛莉亚公主和阿莱克西娅公主而被拘留。
description: A 33-year-old Dutch man suspected of planning an attack on Princesses Amalia and Alexia remains in custody after a preliminary court hearing on Monday, where he strongly denied any intent to harm t
description_zh: 一名33岁的荷兰男子涉嫌策划袭击阿玛莉亚公主和阿莱克西娅公主，在周一的预审听证会后仍被拘留。他在听证会上强烈否认有任何伤害公主的意图。

title: NAC loses passport case against Go Ahead Eagles, averting chaos
title_zh: NAC 输掉与 Go Ahead Eagles 的护照诉讼，避免了一场混乱。
description: Breda football club NAC have lost their bid to replay a match against Go Ahead Eagles after discovering the Deventer...
description_zh: 布雷达足球俱乐部NAC在发现德文特尔...后，其与前进之鹰队重赛的请求被驳回。

title: All major wildfires extinguished after days of firefighting, weekend of thunderstorms
title_zh: 经过数日灭火和周末雷暴天气，所有主要野火均已被扑灭。
description: After days of firefighting and a weekend of thunderstorms, all the wildfires that raged in the Netherlands since last week have been extinguished. At 9:30 p.m.
description_zh: 经过数日的灭火和周末的雷暴雨，自上周以来在荷兰肆虐的所有野火均已被扑灭。晚上9点30分

title: Dutch public health institute calls for neutral design for vapes, on top of flavor ban
title_zh: 荷兰公共卫生机构呼吁电子烟产品采用中性设计，并禁止添加各种口味。
description: The public health instituteRIVMwants the Dutch government to mandate a
description_zh: 荷兰国家公共卫生与环境研究所 (RIVM) 希望荷兰政府强制执行一项

title: Man found critically wounded in car near Rotterdam police station after stabbing
title_zh: 一名男子在鹿特丹警察局附近的一辆车内被发现身受重伤，此前他被刺伤。
description: A man was found critically wounded with multiple stab wounds inside a car near a police station in Rotterdam-Charlois late Sunday, Rijnmond
description_zh: 周日晚间，在鹿特丹-夏洛瓦区莱茵蒙德附近的一处警察局内，一名男子被发现身受重伤，身上有多处刀伤，倒在一辆车内。

title: Box with photos, papers of WWII resistance fighter discovered in Royal Library depot
title_zh: 在皇家图书馆仓库发现装有二战抵抗战士照片和文件的盒子
description: Warheouse staff at the Royal Library in The Hague discovered a box containing remarkable material from the Second World War in its depot, the library
description_zh: 海牙皇家图书馆的仓库工作人员在其仓库中发现了一个装有二战时期珍贵资料的箱子。

title: New genetic treatment for pancreatic cancer tested in Nijmegen
title_zh: 奈梅亨正在测试一种治疗胰腺癌的新基因疗法
description: A patient in Nijmegen has become the first person in the world to receive a new form of genetic treatment...
description_zh: 奈梅亨的一名患者成为世界上首例接受新型基因治疗的患者……

title: An intensive 10-day course gets you speaking Dutch from Day One
title_zh: 为期10天的强化课程，让你从第一天起就能说荷兰语。
description: If you think language lessons are about learning grammar and lists of words by rote, think again. Amsterdam language school...
description_zh: 如果你认为语言课就是死记硬背语法和单词表，那就大错特错了。阿姆斯特丹语言学校……

title: Three Dutch nationals die in road crash in northern France
title_zh: 三名荷兰公民在法国北部发生的车祸中丧生
description: Three Dutch nationals have died and a fourth is in a critical condition after a car overturned in a collision...
description_zh: 一辆汽车发生翻车事故，造成三名荷兰公民死亡，第四名公民伤势危重。

title: Defence minister calls for “cool heads” over US troop withdrawal
title_zh: 国防部长呼吁各方在美军撤离问题上保持“冷静”。
description: Dutch defence minister Dilan Yesilgöz has called for “cool heads” in the wake of US president Donald Trump’s threat to...
description_zh: 荷兰国防大臣迪兰·耶希尔戈兹呼吁各方保持“冷静”，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普威胁要……

title: No trains running between Utrecht and The Hague due to signal failure
title_zh: 由于信号故障，乌得勒支和海牙之间没有列车运行。
description: Due to a signal failure, no trains are running between Utrecht and The Hague on Monday morning.
description_zh: 由于信号故障，周一上午乌得勒支和海牙之间没有列车运行。

title: Hantavirus on Dutch cruise ship; At least three dead, including two Dutch
title_zh: 荷兰游轮爆发汉坦病毒疫情，至少三人死亡，其中包括两名荷兰人。
description: At least three passengers on the Dutch cruise ship MV Hondius in the Atlantic Ocean have died from a respiratory infection, likely caused by the hantavirus.
description_zh: 大西洋上荷兰邮轮“洪迪乌斯号”上至少有三名乘客死于呼吸道感染，很可能是由汉坦病毒引起的。

title: National WWII monument in Amsterdam defaced just before Remembrance Day commemoration
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹国家二战纪念碑在阵亡将士纪念日前夕遭到破坏
description: The National Monument on Dam Square in Amsterdam was defaced with red paint early on Monday morning.
description_zh: 周一清晨，阿姆斯特丹水坝广场上的国家纪念碑被人用红漆泼洒。

title: Live white-beaked dolphin washed ashore on Egmond aan Zee beach
title_zh: 一头活着的白喙海豚被冲上埃格蒙德安泽海滩。
description: A live white-beaked dolphin washed ashore on the beach of Egmond aan Zee on Sunday night, the SOS Dolfijn foundation
description_zh: 周日晚间，一只活着的白喙海豚被冲上埃格蒙德安泽海滩，SOS海豚基金会对此表示关注。

title: WWII memorial sites increasingly facing anti-Semitism, violence, threats
title_zh: 二战纪念场所日益面临反犹主义、暴力和威胁
description: Over 80 years after the Second World War, memorial sites in the Netherlands and abroad are increasingly facing anti-Semitism, violence, and threats.
description_zh: 第二次世界大战结束 80 多年后，荷兰和国外的纪念场所日益面临反犹太主义、暴力和威胁。

title: Mayors condemn continuing violent anti-refugee protests
title_zh: 市长们谴责持续不断的暴力反难民抗议活动
description: Violent anti-refugee campaigners attacked the town hall and neighbouring theatre in the Utrecht town of IJsselstein on Saturday evening, throwing...
description_zh: 周六晚间，暴力反难民活动分子袭击了乌得勒支省艾瑟尔斯坦镇的市政厅和邻近的剧院，并向其投掷物品……

title: Cruise ship passengers stranded at sea after hantavirus outbreak
title_zh: 汉坦病毒爆发后，邮轮乘客滞留海上
description: Three cruise ship passengers have died and a fourth is in intensive care after a suspected outbreak of hantavirus in...
description_zh: 一艘邮轮上疑似爆发汉坦病毒疫情，造成三名乘客死亡，第四名乘客正在重症监护室接受治疗。

title: National war memorial in Amsterdam daubed with red paint
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹国家战争纪念碑被涂上了红色油漆
description: The national war memorial on the Dam in central Amsterdam was sprayed with red paint in the early hours of...
description_zh: 位于阿姆斯特丹市中心水坝上的国家战争纪念碑在凌晨时分被人喷上了红色油漆……

title: Dutch pesticide buffer rules stall construction of tens of thousands of homes
title_zh: 荷兰的农药缓冲带规定导致数万套房屋的建设停滞。
description: Rules requiring buffer zones between farmland and new housing projects are delaying the construction of tens of thousands of homes across the Netherlands, with municipalities warning that the restr
description_zh: 荷兰各地要求在农田和新建住宅项目之间设立缓冲区的规定，导致数万套住房的建设延期，各市政当局警告称，这些限制措施可能会造成严重后果。

title: Dutch 30 km/h zones add more than five minutes to some bus trips
title_zh: 荷兰限速30公里/小时的区域会使一些公交车行程增加五分钟以上。
description: Passenger organization Rover says the 30 km/h speed limits in Dutch urban areas are slowing bus services and putting pressure on public transport operations, AD
description_zh: 乘客组织Rover表示，荷兰城区30公里/小时的限速正在减缓公交车服务速度，并给公共交通运营带来压力。

title: Feyenoord close in on Champions League as relegation fight heats up
title_zh: 费耶诺德距离欧冠资格越来越近，而保级大战也愈演愈烈。
description: Feyenoord took a huge step towards UEFA Champions League qualification on Sunday when they scored twice in the last 10 minutes to beat Fortuna Sittard away.
description_zh: 费耶诺德在周日客场击败福图纳锡塔德，在最后 10 分钟内连入两球，向欧冠资格迈出了重要一步。

title: Max Verstappen recovers to fifth place in Miami after first-lap spin
title_zh: 马克斯·维斯塔潘在迈阿密赛道首圈失控后奋起直追，最终获得第五名。
description: Max Verstappen finished fifth in the Miami Grand Prix on Sunday.
description_zh: 马克斯·维斯塔潘在周日的迈阿密大奖赛中获得第五名。

title: Crucial Polderbaan runway at Schiphol Airport to close for annual maintenance
title_zh: 史基浦机场关键的波尔德班跑道将关闭进行年度维护
description: Schiphol Airport will close the Polderbaan runway for annual maintenance from Monday, May 4, through Tuesday, May 12, making it unavailable to air traffic on weekdays.
description_zh: 史基浦机场将于 5 月 4 日星期一至 5 月 12 日星期二关闭 Polderbaan 跑道进行年度维护，工作日将无法使用该跑道进行空中交通。

title: Feyenoord close in on Champions League, hopes rise for Excelsior
title_zh: 费耶诺德距离欧冠资格越来越近，埃克塞尔西奥的希望也随之高涨。
description: Feyenoord are on the brink of playing in next year’s Champions League group stage after staging a late comeback at...
description_zh: 费耶诺德在客场上演惊天逆转后，距离明年欧冠小组赛的参赛资格仅一步之遥……

title: AZ snatch late draw against FC Twente with last-second equalizer
title_zh: AZ 凭借最后一秒的扳平进球，艰难地从特温特手中抢得一场平局。
description: AZ Alkmaar scored in the final seconds of the game to ensure that the points were shared in their home game against FC Twente.
description_zh: 阿尔克马尔在比赛最后时刻进球，确保在主场与特温特的比赛中双方握手言和。

title: Doornspijk man, 66, killed in seven-vehicle crash at German border control on A12
title_zh: 一名66岁的多恩斯派克男子在A12公路德国边境检查站附近发生的七车连环相撞事故中丧生。
description: A 66-year-old man from Doornspijk died, and a 28-year-old man from Amersfoort was arrested following a seven-vehicle chain-reaction crash last Saturday at the German border control on the A12, Dutc
description_zh: 上周六，在德国A12高速公路的边境检查站附近发生一起七车连环相撞事故，造成一名来自多恩斯派克（Doornspijk）的66岁男子死亡，一名来自阿默斯福特（Amersfoort）的28岁男子被捕。

title: Used electric car sales in Netherlands nearly double in April
title_zh: 荷兰4月份二手电动汽车销量几乎翻了一番。
description: Sales of used electric cars in the Netherlands nearly doubled in April to 13,791 vehicles, according to the industry group BOVAG. The figure is almost twice that of April of the previous year.
description_zh: 据行业组织BOVAG的数据显示，4月份荷兰二手电动汽车销量几乎翻了一番，达到13791辆。这一数字几乎是去年同期的两倍。

title: NOS paid ex-director nearly four times more in severance than disclosed
title_zh: NOS支付给前董事的遣散费几乎是披露金额的四倍。
description: The Dutch public broadcaster NOS disclosed in its newly released annual report that it paid former general director Gerard Timmer a full 75,000-euro severance package — nearly four times the roughl
description_zh: 荷兰公共广播公司NOS在其最新发布的年度报告中披露，已向前任总经理杰拉德·蒂默支付了7.5万欧元的全额离职补偿金——几乎是其薪酬的四倍。

title: Video: One dead, two injured in Oldenzaal house fire
title_zh: 视频：奥尔登扎尔一栋房屋发生火灾，一人死亡，两人受伤
description: One person died and two others were hospitalized Sunday afternoon after a fire destroyed a row house on Frederik van Eedenstraat in Oldenzaal, RTL
description_zh: 据RTL报道，周日下午，奥尔登扎尔弗雷德里克·范·伊登街的一栋排屋发生火灾，造成一人死亡，两人受伤送医。

title: Foodwatch urges stricter salmon labels after 2.5 million die at certified Norwegian farm
title_zh: 在一家获得认证的挪威养殖场发生250万条鲑鱼死亡事件后，食品观察组织敦促加强鲑鱼标签的严格性。
description: Consumer group Foodwatch has launched a petition calling for stricter rules for the Aquaculture Stewardship Council and GlobalG.A.P.
description_zh: 消费者组织Foodwatch发起了一项请愿活动，呼吁对水产养殖管理委员会（ASC）和GlobalG.AP制定更严格的规则。

title: Thunderstorm warnings hit northeast Netherlands for second day after dry April
title_zh: 荷兰东北部在经历了干燥的四月之后，连续第二天遭遇雷暴预警。
description: The Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI)issueda Code Yellow thunderstorm warning Sunday afternoon for the n
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）周日下午发布了黄色雷暴预警。

title: Mayor calls attackers 'scum' after windows smashed at IJsselstein town hall and theater
title_zh: 艾瑟尔斯坦市政厅和剧院窗户遭砸后，市长称袭击者为“人渣”。
description: People damaged the IJsselstein town hall and adjacent Fulcotheater in an overnight attack, smashing multiple windows with bricks around 1:45 a.m.
description_zh: 凌晨1点45分左右，有人袭击了艾瑟尔施泰因市政厅和毗邻的富尔科剧院，用砖块砸碎了多扇窗户。

title: The Hague cafe owner faces 15 years for fatally shooting customer in face
title_zh: 海牙一家咖啡馆的老板因枪击顾客面部致其死亡，面临15年监禁。
description: The 51-year-old cafe owner arrested in thefatal shootingof a 45-year-old customer outside his bar on S
description_zh: 一名51岁的咖啡馆老板因在其位于S街的酒吧外枪杀一名45岁的顾客而被捕。

title: 38-year-old Amsterdam man arrested in fatal Amsterdam-Oost stabbing
title_zh: 38 岁阿姆斯特丹男子因阿姆斯特丹-乌斯特刺伤事件被捕
description: A 38-year-old man from Amsterdam has been arrested on suspicion of involvement in a fatal stabbing that killed another Amsterdammer, 54, near a basketball court in Amsterdam-Oost, NH
description_zh: 一名来自阿姆斯特丹的38岁男子因涉嫌参与一起致命刺杀案而被捕，该案发生在新罕布什尔州阿姆斯特丹东区的一个篮球场附近，受害者是一名54岁的阿姆斯特丹居民。

title: Thunder and 2-centimeter hail sweep southern Netherlands, halting wildfire operations
title_zh: 雷声伴有直径2厘米的冰雹席卷荷兰南部，导致野火扑救行动暂停。
description: Severethunderstormswith hailstones up to 2 centimeters in diameter, heavy rai
description_zh: 伴有直径达 2 厘米冰雹的强雷暴，以及强降雨

title: Ermelo man sentenced to prison for vandalizing Loosdrecht town hall over asylum plans
title_zh: 埃尔梅洛一名男子因破坏洛斯德雷赫特市政厅以抗议庇护计划而被判入狱。
description: A 34-year-old man from Ermelo was sentenced Friday to six weeks in prison forvandalizin
description_zh: 一名来自埃尔梅洛的34岁男子周五因破坏公物被判处六周监禁。

title: Dutch teachers report surge in Holocaust disinformation from TikTok and AI
title_zh: 荷兰教师报告称，TikTok和人工智能平台上的有关大屠杀的虚假信息激增。
description: History and social studies teachers at secondary schools across the Netherlands are regularly confronted in class with disinformation about the Holocaust that students reportedly encounter on TikTo
description_zh: 荷兰各地中学的历史和社会研究教师经常在课堂上遇到关于大屠杀的虚假信息，据报道，这些信息是学生们在TikTok上接触到的。

title: Inburgering with DN: What you need to know about May 4 and 5
title_zh: DN 的入城活动：关于 5 月 4 日和 5 日你需要知道的事情
description: The Netherlands takes two days to mark the end of the war: a day to remember the fallen on the...
description_zh: 荷兰用两天时间纪念战争结束：一天缅怀在战争中阵亡的将士……

title: Regulator: 800,000 Dutch households have money to invest but don't
title_zh: 监管机构：80万荷兰家庭有钱投资，但却没有投资。
description: One in 10 Dutch households has sufficient financial resources to invest but is not doing so, the Authority for the Financial Markets
description_zh: 荷兰金融市场管理局的数据显示，十分之一的荷兰家庭拥有足够的财力进行投资，但却没有这样做。

title: Youth care use in the Netherlands falls for first time in years
title_zh: 荷兰青少年护理使用量多年来首次下降
description: A total of 477,000 young people received youth care last year, a decline of 2.8% compared with the year before, a decline of 2.8% compared with the year before, according to Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 根据荷兰统计局的数据，去年共有 477,000 名青少年接受了青少年护理服务，比上一年下降了 2.8%。

title: Video: Eight homes evacuated after car fire spreads to residences in Hoogeveen center
title_zh: 视频：霍格文中心发生汽车火灾，火势蔓延至居民区，八户居民被疏散
description: Eight homes were evacuated in the center of Hoogeveen early Sunday after a fire that started in a car parked under a carport quickly spread to two dwellings in an apartment complex, authorities sai
description_zh: 周日清晨，霍格文镇中心一处公寓楼发生火灾，起火点是一辆停在车棚下的汽车，火势迅速蔓延至两栋住宅，导致八户居民被疏散。当局表示。

title: Police arrest two Rotterdam men after teen stabbed, shots fired in Delfshaven
title_zh: 德尔夫沙芬发生青少年被刺伤、枪击事件后，警方逮捕了两名鹿特丹男子。
description: Police arrested two men from Rotterdam, ages 18 and 22, last evening and overnight after a 17-year-old boy from Rotterdam was stabbed and shots were fired Saturday evening in the Delfshaven distric
description_zh: 昨晚和夜间，警方逮捕了两名来自鹿特丹的男子，年龄分别为18岁和22岁。此前，一名17岁的鹿特丹男孩于周六晚在德尔夫沙芬区被刺伤，并遭到枪击。

title: Court tosses case against man accused of laundering Red Light District properties
title_zh: 法院驳回对一名被控洗钱红灯区房产的男子的指控。
description: An Amsterdam appeals court on Friday declared prosecutors inadmissible in the money laundering case against Marcel Kaatee, ruling they had charged him twice for the same offenses involving properti
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹一家上诉法院周五宣布，检方在针对马塞尔·卡特的洗钱案中不具备举证资格，理由是他们就同一桩涉及财产的罪行对他进行了两次指控。
